name: spora-ai/spora
description: Spora operator-facing project template — Bedrock-style template for AI agent orchestration on shared hosting (cPanel/FTP). Requires spora-ai/spora-core (framework) and spora-ai/spora-frontend (admin UI).

scripts.dev: bash -c 'CMD="php -S ${PHP_HOST:-0.0.0.0}:${PHP_PORT:-8080} -t public"; if [ -n "$COMPOSER_DEV_TIMEOUT" ]; then exec $CMD; elif command -v gtimeout >/dev/null; then exec gtimeout ${COMPOSER_DEV_TIMEOUT:-3600} $CMD; elif command -v timeout >/dev/null; then exec timeout ${COMPOSER_DEV_TIMEOUT:-3600} $CMD; else exec $CMD; fi'
